Duration real: 3 días vs estimate 3-4 semanas.

activeDG.baseline_14_pass_signals: (1) CLI terminal diff-aware line `Scan diff vs previous triage: 0 new, 0 re-classified, 44 unchanged.` PASS. (2) Sidebar summary scan-diff line matching terminal PASS. (3) Previously section colapsable renderiza en 44 findings con timestamps + providerLabels + rationales PASS. (4) providerLabel plumbing dual correcto: 'colony-memory' para colony-learning + 'deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash' para LLM real PASS. (5) BANNER `Verdict changed since last scan: false positive 95% → false positive 75%` con reason 'Different provider (deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash → colony-memory)' triggered empíricamente en agent.ts:62 finding target PASS. (6) verdict_history preserva cross clearTriageDataForFingerprints INVARIANTE verified in production PASS.
